title: Non-Sticky Mini Barrel Slime Kit, 6 Random Goody Bag Fillers for Kids, Soft Stretchy Stress Toys, Easter Party Favor Supplies, Classroom Prizes for Boys and Girls - 210g
features: Easy Storage & Long-lasting Fun: Each slime comes in a reusable plastic jar to prevent drying. Soft, non-sticky, and easy to clean, it won’t stick to hands, carpets, or walls. Store it back in the jar to ensure long-lasting playtime.

Creative Arts & Crafts Activity: Twist, smash, and shape the slime to create art or fun shapes. Perfect for birthday gifts, stocking fillers, easter party bag fillers, Halloween treats, carnival prizes, Christmas, school rewards, baby showers, and event decorations.

Educational Stress Relief Toy: Mix different slimes to explore new textures, stimulating creativity and imagination. Ideal easter gifts, easter goodie bag filler for kids and adults to relieve stress, develop hands-on abilities, and encourage hours of screen-free entertainment.

Premium Quality & Safe Material: Made from non-toxic, eco-friendly ingredients, the slime is ASTM CE certified. Cool, soft, and non-sticky, it’s safe for kids to play with and comes in mini jars measuring 8cm x 4cm for easy handling.

Fun Slime Party Favors: Includes 6x Random colourful 210g mini barrel slimes, perfect for party bag fillers, classroom prizes, and gifts. Stretchy, fun, and interactive, ideal for creating joyful parent-child moments and improving motor skills.
description: Product Description Educational & Creative Slime Play Unleash creativity with our colourful slime set – a fun and educational stress relief toy for kids and adults. Children can mix, stretch, twist, and squeeze the slimes to explore unique textures, boosting imagination, creativity, and sensory development. Perfect for sensory play activities, it helps kids improve fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and focus, while also providing stress and anxiety relief for adults. This slime kit encourages hours of screen-free entertainment, making it an ideal alternative to digital devices and an engaging arts and crafts activity for both boys and girls. Safe, Non-Toxic & Mess-Free Slime Our premium quality slime is made from non-toxic, eco-friendly, and skin-safe ingredients, fully ASTM and CE certified for children’s safety. Designed to be soft, smooth, and non-sticky, it won’t leave residue on hands, carpets, or furniture, making it a choice for parents. Unlike cheap slime toys, this set offers durable, reusable, and easy-to-clean fun for kids. Each slime comes in a sealed container to prevent drying out, ensuring long-lasting playtime. A safe and hygienic choice for sensory activities, classroom use, and interactive parent-child play. Perfect Gift, Party Bag Fillers & Rewards Whether you’re looking for kids’ party favours, school prizes, or unique gifts, our colourful mini slime jars are the perfect choice. They make great birthday gifts, stocking fillers, classroom rewards, easter egg fillers, Halloween trick-or-treat toys, carnival prizes, Christmas party bag fillers, and even baby shower game supplies. Loved by children of all ages, these slimes create fun parent-child bonding moments and are ideal for group activities, classroom giveaways, and sensory play events. A must-have gift idea for kids who enjoy interactive toys, crafts, and creative play. Long-Lasting Fun with Easy Storage Each slime comes in a reusable, portable mini jar (8cm x 4cm, 35g each), designed to keep slime soft and fresh for repeated use. Compact and travel-friendly, these jars make it easy to take slime fun anywhere – whether at home, school, parties, or on the go. Simply store the slime back into the container after play to prevent drying, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment. With bright colours, smooth texture, and hours of stretchable fun, this slime set is a perfect combination of stress relief, creative activity, and sensory play for kids and adults alike. Product Type Educational Stress Relief Slime Toy Material Non-toxic, eco-friendly ingredients Slime Weight 35g per mini jar Jar Size 8cm (height) x 4cm (diameter) Texture Soft, stretchy, non-sticky, mess-free Storage Reusable plastic jar, prevents drying Age Recommendation Suitable for kids 3+ years Uses Sensory play, stress relief, arts & crafts Occasions Birthday gifts, party bag fillers, stocking fillers, classroom rewards, carnival prizes
